message:
chore: add agent session ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for common agent-generated ephemeral files that should
never be committed: SESSION_TODO.md, SESSION_REPORT.md, verify_*.sh,
newfile.txt, repro_*.rs. Also add crates/*/target/, target-codex*/,
target_*/, and .claude/settings.local.json patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,3 +62,21 @@ Safe
 ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
+
+# Agent session ephemeral files
+SESSION_TODO.md
+SESSION_REPORT.md
+SESSION_*.md
+verify_*.sh
+newfile.txt
+repro_*.rs
+
+# Nested crate build artifacts
+crates/*/target/
+
+# Codex/agent build artifacts
+target-codex*/
+target_*/
+
+# Claude local settings
+.claude/settings.local.json
